startTimeR

statutR
"RESERVED"
idUser
1
_class
"tn.matchmakers.reservationservice.entities.Reservation"
aussi dans l'api de mise a jour de reservation il demande un id integer ce qui est different que le type l'id enrigstré dans la collection
aussi j'ai rencontré des problèmes de structure dans les apis, j'ai mis json ignore mais aussi j'ai trouvé que je dois mettre des objects imbriqué pour que les api marche bien , donc je propose qu'on ajoute une partie de dto dans chaque service: reservation et social ","o|v|w|x|y|z|o|q","a|r|10","rich_text_json_repr","mentioned_items","a|u|12|g|13","","type","content","a|16|17","doc","a|16","paragraph","o|1A|1B","a|1C","o|18|19|1D","draft","o|14|15|1E|1F|B","o|T|C|U|V|V|W|B|A|A|a|b|c|8|11|8|1G","a|E|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R|S","2026-03-21T14:51:39.094Z","baselineTimestamp","a|X|1K","o|1L|A|b","7c7db8af-bc23-4c0c-aa0a-87eb1df650d0","58b31cc6-5ed5-4f43-ba9f-965bf966f0ae","2026-03-21T14:51:42.640Z","o|v|w|1O|1P|z|o|q","a|1Q","a|u|12|g","o|1S|15|1E|1F","o|1I|7|1J|1J|W|B|A|A|1M|b|1N|8|1R|8|1T","o|D|1H|1U","o|6|7|8|9|A|B|1V"],"1W"]
